title: Author the web/backend security skill files: node, payments, react
description: Complete the set of eight per-stack security skill files by authoring the general web/backend stacks in the sprint-2 format: node (Express/Node backend: injection, BOLA/BFLA/mass-assignment, SSRF, path traversal, command injection, insecure deserialization/vm, JWT/session, secret handling), payments (PSP webhook HMAC/replay, idempotency keys, refund/chargeback abuse, amount/currency integrity, withdrawal approval thresholds), and react (XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML/innerHTML, client-trust/secret-in-bundle, unsafe redirect, postMessage origin). After this sprint all 7 stacks + generic have real signature files.

successCriteria.description: skills/bober.security-node/SKILL.md exists with >= 10 signature blocks covering at least: SQL/NoSQL injection + ORM escape hatches (.raw/.literal/$queryRawUnsafe/$where), command injection (exec/shell:true), path traversal (path.join/resolve no boundary), SSRF (unvalidated fetch/axios + metadata/RFC1918), BOLA (id->DB lookup no ownerId check), BOPLA/mass-assignment (Model.update(req.body)), BFLA (no role gate on admin route), insecure deserialization / vm-as-sandbox, hardcoded/logged secrets, JWT alg:none/weak-secret / session fixation.

skills/bober.security-payments/SKILL.md exists with >= 8 signature blocks covering at least: missing/weak webhook HMAC signature (non-constant-time compare, no timestamp), missing idempotency key on money endpoints (+ the atomic check-then-insert requirement), duplicate-credit on PSP webhook replay, refund/chargeback abuse, float money / currency-conversion mismatch, withdraw-to-different-method-than-deposit, missing withdrawal approval threshold / dual control.

skills/bober.security-react/SKILL.md exists with >= 6 signature blocks covering at least: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML / innerHTML / document.write with variable input, secret/API-key committed into the client bundle, client-side trust of security decisions that must be server-side, unsafe href/redirect (javascript: / open-redirect), postMessage without origin check, prototype-pollution via client deep-merge of untrusted input.

All three new skill files parse via SecuritySignatureParser (reading the REAL files) to their claimed block counts with zero dropped blocks; every signature's vulnClass is a VulnClass union member with a non-empty unsafe/safe example.

A single test enumerates skills/bober.security-*/SKILL.md and asserts EXACTLY the 8 expected stack files exist (solidity, anchor, react, node, payments, igaming, dex-backend, generic) and each parses to >= 6 signatures; npm run build + typecheck + lint pass; full suite green.

nonGoals: Do not build the index/selector/registry or wire retrieval into the finder (sprint 5).
Do not change TypeScript runtime behavior.
Do not modify the existing skills/bober.react/SKILL.md (that is the framework skill; this is the separate bober.security-react security skill).
stopConditions: All 8 stack security skill files exist and parse with zero dropped blocks.
The enumeration test locks the exact expected file set.
definitionOfDone: The three web/backend security skill files exist and parse cleanly, completing all 8 per-stack security skill files, verified by an enumeration test; the suite stays green.
assumptions: The sprint-2 format/parser and sprint-3 authoring precedent are the contract.

Signature content is sourced from research-20260714 section A (OWASP/injection) + supply-chain-adjacent items for payments; the node file overlaps generic but is stack-scoped and independently parseable.
outOfScope: Index/selector/registry, finder wiring, supply-chain, verifier, benchmark, dogfood (later).
generatorNotes: Author in the sprint-2/3 format. node: emphasize the BOLA/BOPLA/BFLA family (the research names BOLA ~40% of API attacks) and the raw-SQL escape hatches. payments: emphasize webhook HMAC (raw-body, crypto.timingSafeEqual, signed timestamp) and idempotency (atomic check-then-insert). react: emphasize dangerouslySetInnerHTML/innerHTML and secret-in-bundle. Keep examples minimal. Source from .bober/research/research-20260714-...-research.md section A and the iGaming/payments webhook items in section B. Verify each parses.
evaluatorNotes: sc-4-1..4-3: read each REAL file, parse, assert min block count with ZERO dropped and union-member vulnClasses. sc-4-5: glob skills/bober.security-*/SKILL.md, assert the set equals exactly the 8 expected names, each parsing to >=6 signatures. Build+typecheck+lint+full suite.
